boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations release a routine action when the dependency closure must match the requested object, scope, and release condition?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Release condition mismatch prevents allowance. REQ-BAP-002 requires RC-BAP-002; DEP-BAP-002 supplies RC-BAP-002-S.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: REQ-BAP-002 requires release condition RC-BAP-002; DEP-BAP-002 provides RC-BAP-002-S. MATCH-BAP-002 mandates exact release condition match.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Exact match rule (MATCH-BAP-002) requires identical release conditions. The mismatch between RC-BAP-002 and RC-BAP-002-S triggers escalation per source-record defect protocol.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: DEP-BAP-002 completed 2026-06-17 09:05 before queued release at 10:30; object, account, scope, and timestamp match, but release condition does not.

final_answer: The action may not proceed. Source records confirm the dependency closure (DEP-BAP-002) completed before the queued release time, matching the source object, account, scope, and timestamp requirements. However, REQ-BAP-002 specifies release condition RC-BAP-002 while DEP-BAP-002 provides RC-BAP-002-S. The exact match rule in MATCH-BAP-002 mandates identical release conditions. This narrow source-record defect—release condition mismatch—leaves the source boundary open, requiring escalation before execution can proceed.
open_blockers: Release condition mismatch: RC-BAP-002 requested by REQ-BAP-002, RC-BAP-002-S provided by DEP-BAP-002.
Gov baton requires 'final' objective but state shows ADVERSARIAL_SCOPE_CHALLENGER role; flagging conflict.
